title: pinus densata subsp. wilsonii
intro: Pinus densata subsp. wilsonii, also known as Chinese white pine, is a species of evergreen tree native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Pinus densata subsp. wilsonii include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pinus densata subsp. wilsonii can be made into tea, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, from respiratory problems to skin conditions.
